blocks.text: Glimt carry Norway's dream to San Siro — history awaits
Arsenal are 5 points clear at the top after humiliating Spurs 4-1. Barcelona cruise 3-0. Tonight's PL and La Liga slate is forgettable — save everything for Tuesday.

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League — Tuesday
items: 18:45 — Atlético Madrid vs Club Brugge — all square, must-win for Atleti
21:00 — Bayer Leverkusen vs Olympiacos — Leverkusen heavy favourites
21:00 — Newcastle United vs FK Qarabag — 6-1 on aggregate, dead rubber

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League — Wednesday
items: 18:45 — Atalanta vs Borussia Dortmund — Atalanta need two goals to overturn 2-0 deficit
21:00 — AS Monaco vs PSG — PSG lead 3-2, French derby far from settled
21:00 — Benfica vs Real Madrid — narrow Madrid lead, tense night at Estádio da Luz
